cards.heading: AI-assisted planning
cards.body: Generate practical short-term task plans from your goals in seconds. Review suggestions before committing — nothing is created until you confirm.

cards.heading: Goal-based organisation
cards.body: Group tasks under goals and watch per-goal progress bars fill in real time. Clear AI-generated tasks for a goal with one click when priorities shift.

cards.heading: Story points & tiers
cards.body: Earn story points as you complete tasks. Difficulty multiplies your score. Climb from Poem to Epic as momentum builds across sessions.

cards.heading: Board and list views
cards.body: Switch between a drag-and-drop Kanban board and a filterable list view. Status changes sync instantly with no page reload needed.
